author: Swim Reapers
name: SRVehicleHub
short: Reap vehicle shop for DeliveryPlugin money and VehicleOwnershipPlugin ownership.
description: Redbot cog allowing users to link Steam IDs, view balances, browse vehicle_shop.json, and buy cars using delivery_points.json. Purchases write owned vehicles to one or more VehicleOwnershipPlugin owned_vehicles.json files for multi-server sync.
install_msg: Loaded SRVehicleHub. Main command is [p]reap. Use [p]reap config addpoints, [p]reap config addowned, [p]reap config setshop, then [p]reap status.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores Discord user ID to Steam ID links and reads/writes configured local JSON files containing Steam IDs
